keyPointsSummary: Notices begin with the word 'Notice' and a heading describing the subject
State who the notice is for, what must be done, and by when
Keep notices short, formal, and to the point — no personal opinions
General writing skill: clarity and conciseness matter in every format learned so far

quickQuiz.answer: Notice: The school will remain closed tomorrow.

quickQuiz.hindi: सभी छात्रों को समय पर पहुँचना है।
quickQuiz.answer: All students must arrive on time.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह सूचना सभी कर्मचारियों के लिए है।
quickQuiz.answer: This notice is for all employees.
The office will be closed tomorrow.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह सूचना तुरंत प्रभाव से लागू है।
सभी को यह सूचना पढ़नी चाहिए।
आगामी सोमवार को बैठक आयोजित की जाएगी।
quickQuiz.answer: A meeting will be held next Monday.

quickQuiz.hindi: सभी सदस्यों की उपस्थिति अनिवार्य है।
quickQuiz.answer: Attendance of all members is compulsory.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह सूचना बोर्ड पर लगाई गई है।
quickQuiz.answer: This notice has been put up on the board.

quickQuiz.hindi: किसी भी प्रश्न के लिए कार्यालय से संपर्क करें।
quickQuiz.answer: Contact the office for any questions.

mustRememberRules: Notices begin with the word 'Notice' and a heading describing the subject
State who the notice is for, what must be done, and by when
Keep notices short, formal, and to the point — no personal opinions
General writing skill: clarity and conciseness matter in every format learned so far
